instruction: Open System Settings, go to Wi-Fi, and turn the Wi-Fi switch {STATE}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 AX-tree, §7). Verified via the live AX switch value rather than the async-flushed plist, the macOS analogue of OSWorld check_accessibility_tree.

args: defaults write com.apple.wifi.guibench Power -int {BASELINE}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
defaults write com.apple.wifi.guibench Power -int {WANT}; killall cfprefsd 2>/dev/null || true
